title: Reorder Routes to Make All Paths Lead to the City Zero

testcases.input: n = 6, connections = [[0,1],[1,3],[2,3],[4,0],[4,5]] Output: 3 Explanation: Change the direction of edges show in red such that each node can reach the node 0 (capital).
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: Change the direction of edges show in red such that each node can reach the node 0 (capital).

testcases.input: n = 5, connections = [[1,0],[1,2],[3,2],[3,4]] Output: 2 Explanation: Change the direction of edges show in red such that each node can reach the node 0 (capital).
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: Change the direction of edges show in red such that each node can reach the node 0 (capital).
